title: Implement request models and prompt-safety validation
acceptance_criteria: Request DTO captures sanitized user name, creativity (0-10) and uploaded image metadata/base64 payload
Validator rejects missing files, oversized payloads and unsupported MIME types with descriptive 400 errors
Prompt injection guard strips script tags/URLs and enforces allowed character whitelist before OpenAI usage
Unit tests cover valid/invalid inputs plus sanitization edge cases
